name: Config Gate
description: Gated OpenClaw config patching: validates JSON Merge Patches, blocks unsafe direct edits/restarts, and applies only after native approval.

approvalChannelId.description: Discord channel ID to post approval cards. Defaults to OC_CONFIG_GATE_CHANNEL env var or meta-openclaw channel.

pendingTtlMs.description: How long a pending approval is valid before it expires (default: 30 min)

restartDelayMs.description: Deprecated. The plugin no longer imports gateway restart internals directly.

allowGatewayRestart.description: Allow approved staged requests to call OpenClaw's official safe gateway restart command after write/bless.

authorizedDiscordUserIds.description: Discord user IDs allowed to approve or deny staged config changes.

allowedAgentIds.description: OpenClaw agent IDs allowed to make direct config/restart changes. Other agents must use oc_config_stage.
